findings.description: Monolithic parser: 5,578 lines handling Claude + Codex + Cursor parsing in a single file. Largest file by 3.7x.
findings.suggestion: Split into provider-specific parser files (cursor_parser.rs, codex_parser.rs) similar to existing claude_parser.rs.

findings.description: Float ball module totals 1,786 lines across mod.rs (891) + layout.rs (895). Layout calculations tightly coupled with IPC.
findings.suggestion: Extract pure geometry/layout math into a standalone module testable without Tauri.

findings.description: Largest Svelte component at 985 lines, mixing drag interaction, layout, animation, and IPC.
findings.suggestion: Decompose into sub-components (FloatBallDrag, FloatBallExpanded, FloatBallLayout).

findings.description: 963 lines with significant business logic mixed with view routing.
findings.suggestion: Extract handler functions into a dedicated module (e.g., lib/appHandlers.ts).

findings.description: 4 development artifacts (bedrock_usage.py, compare_usage.py, etc.) tracked in git, not part of the build.
findings.suggestion: Add tmp/ to .gitignore, remove from tracking with git rm --cached tmp/.

findings.description: 32KB legacy file tracked in git. Not referenced by any build or source file.
findings.suggestion: Document purpose or move to a separate branch; add archive/ to .gitignore if purely historical.

findings.description: 328 unwrap() calls across the Rust codebase. Several in I/O paths where panics crash the app.
findings.suggestion: Audit unwrap() calls in I/O-facing code; replace with ? or .unwrap_or_default().

findings.description: 7 #[allow(dead_code)] in scheduler.rs + 4 in state.rs suggest incomplete updater implementation.
findings.suggestion: Audit dead code: remove if truly unused, or document if planned for future use.

findings.description: 15 silent .catch(() => {}) blocks swallow errors without logging.
findings.suggestion: Replace with .catch((e) => logger.debug('context', e)) for debug visibility.

findings.description: 8 #[allow(dead_code)] annotations, mostly on test helper structs and cache fields.
findings.suggestion: Clean up: remove annotations if items are used in tests; delete truly dead items.

findings.description: background_loop() at 126 lines orchestrates 5 concerns: rate limits, pricing, exchange rates, SSH sync, archival.
findings.suggestion: Consider splitting into focused async tasks coordinated by the main loop.

findings.description: claude.rs, cursor.rs, codex.rs each independently implement HTTP fetch + parse + convert patterns.
findings.suggestion: Extract a shared trait or helper for rate-limit fetch/parse.

findings.description: Three files implement similar fetch-parse-cache-with-TTL patterns for external data.
findings.suggestion: Consolidate into a generic cached-remote-resource helper.

findings.description: 8+ similar toggle handler functions following try/invoke/updateSetting/catch pattern.
findings.suggestion: Extract a generic handleSettingsToggle(command, settingKey, value) helper.

findings.description: 4 nearly identical Cursor API POST requests to different endpoints.
findings.suggestion: Refactor into an endpoint-list iteration with a shared request builder.

findings.description: Lockfile version is 0.10.6 but package.json is 0.11.1. npm ci in CI installs stale deps.
findings.suggestion: Run npm install to regenerate package-lock.json, commit the updated file.

findings.description: noUnusedLocals and noUnusedParameters both set to false — permissive settings.
findings.suggestion: Set both to true and clean up resulting errors.

findings.description: 33 #[allow(dead_code)] annotations. Heaviest in updater/scheduler.rs (7), usage/parser.rs (8), updater/state.rs (4).
findings.suggestion: Audit each annotation: remove if item is used in tests; delete if truly dead.

findings.description: Module-level #[allow(dead_code)] blanket-suppresses warnings for entire usage module tree.
findings.suggestion: Remove blanket annotation; add targeted #[allow(dead_code)] only where needed.

findings.description: 13+ hardcoded API URLs scattered across 7 Rust files.
findings.suggestion: Centralize external URLs into a config.rs or constants module.

findings.description: Background loop cycle constants (SSH=10, rate_limit=5, pricing=120) are local const in function body.
findings.suggestion: Move to a central configuration module or make configurable.

findings.description: Splash screen minimum display time hardcoded to 2900ms.
findings.suggestion: Extract to a named constant or make configurable.

findings.description: All dependencies use appropriate caret ranges. No outdated or deprecated packages.
findings.suggestion: No action needed.

findings.description: Rust dependencies are current with appropriate platform-specific feature flags.
findings.suggestion: No action needed.

orphan_files.notes: Legacy code, not part of build

tidy_recommendations.description: Remove tmp/ artifacts from git tracking and add to .gitignore
Review legacy file: document purpose or remove from tracking

files_to_optimize.description: Split monolithic parser into provider-specific files
Extract handler functions into dedicated module
Refactor repeated Cursor API calls into endpoint iteration
Centralize 13+ hardcoded API URLs into constants module
Move background loop cycle constants to configuration

duplication_groups.pattern: HTTP fetch + parse + convert to RateLimitWindow
duplication_groups.suggestion: Extract shared trait or helper for rate-limit provider fetch/parse

duplication_groups.pattern: Fetch external data + parse + cache with TTL

unresolved.question: Splash screen 2900ms minimum display time — is this an intentional branding choice or should it be shorter/configurable?
